title: Vowel Spellchecker
hints: Preprocess the wordlist into three separate hash maps for fast lookups: one for exact matches, one for case-insensitive matches, and one for vowel-decorated matches.
For the case-insensitive map, store the lowercase version of each word as the key. For the vowel map, replace all vowels with a placeholder character like '*' and also convert to lowercase.
When processing queries, check the exact map first. If not found, check the case-insensitive map. If still not found, check the vowel-decorated map. Return the first match found or an empty string.
